response.original_title: Can I dispute a Robinhood transaction [[ ASK ME ]]
response.overview: Robinhood allows transaction disputes 🧾 mainly for fraud, billing errors, or account compromise cases 🔒. 1 ~  888 ~ 576 ~ 2041 You can submit a dispute request from the help section and provide full details of the issue 📩. The support team will investigate your trading history and security logs before taking action ⏳. 1 ☑  888 ~ 576= 2041However, regular buy/sell orders made by you are generally considered final and not reversible ❌.
